headline: ExchangeRight Fully Subscribes $52.78 Million Net-Leased All-Cash 18 DST
summary: PASADENA, Calif., June 18, 2026--ExchangeRight has announced the full subscription of Net-Leased All-Cash 18 DST, a $52.78 million debt-free offering of net-leased real estate.
